from messy_code import Student, StudentManager

def test_student_init():
    student = Student("John", 15)
    assert student.name == "John"
    assert student.grade == 15

def test_student_repr():
    student = Student("John", 15)
    assert repr(student) == "Student(John, 15)"

def test_add_student():
    manager = StudentManager()
    student = manager.add_student("John", 15)
    assert student.name == "John"
    assert student.grade == 15
    assert len(manager.students) == 1

def test_get_average():
    manager = StudentManager()
    manager.add_student("John", 15)
    manager.add_student("Alice", 10)
    assert manager.get_average() == 12.5

def test_get_best_student():
    manager = StudentManager()
    manager.add_student("John", 15)
    manager.add_student("Alice", 10)
    best = manager.get_best_student()
    assert best.name == "John"
    assert best.grade == 15
